items.name_en: NEVERFULL The Classic King #N41358# Uninspected Version
items.name_cn:
NEVERFULL The Classic King #N41358# Uninspected Version
Dimensions: 31*28*14cm▪️
Known as the 'King of Value'
The Neverfull shopping bag every woman should own is indeed true; it is not only the daily versatile king but also meets the demand for large capacity, fully practical for commuting with a perfect rating!
As a mother-and-child bag, the small bag inside can be removed and carried separately, a value king with multiple uses!

items.name_cn:
New
【With Box】Burberry TB bag, featuring a TB monogram lock design. The design is not overly complex, simple yet classic, with just the right capacity, interpreting the blend of modernity and traditional elegance. It fits various daily outfits and has won the love of many celebrity fashion icons!!
Size 21-7-14CM

items.name_en: 🆕 [Top-tier Original] M11631 Wallet 👏👏 Made of Monogram Dust canvas, giving the Monogram pattern an elegant faded look, showcasing Pharrell Williams' reinterpretation of classic elements. Features a retro Marque L.vuitton Déposé logo on the front, paying homage to the brand's heritage. Dimensions: 7.5x11.1x1.

items.name_en: 🆕 [Top-tier Original] M11706 Suit Wallet 👏👏 Made of Pharrell Williams Monogram Dust canvas from the 2024 Autumn/Winter 'From Paris to Virginia' show, featuring a vintage Monogram pattern and a Marque L.vuitton Déposé logo on the front. Includes card slots, an inner compartment, and a zippered coin pocket. Dimensions: 10x19x2
